assignments.value: ={{ $('detect_issues').first().json.chapterLabel + ' of "' + $('detect_issues').first().json.project_title + '" passed Q/A review. No duplicate content or name inconsistencies detected.' }}

parameters.subject: =Q/A Review: {{ $('detect_issues').first().json.chapterLabel }}: {{ $('detect_issues').first().json.chapter_title }} — {{ $('detect_issues').first().json.project_title }}

={{ ($('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt ? '
' + $('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt + '
' : '') + '

No duplicate content or character name inconsistencies detected.
